forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the morning then tending west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then turning east to northeasterly in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, slight chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Yunta, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
